full_text:
Wang Jun (Ziwen) 王俊 (子文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Jun (王俊), styledZiwen (子文), was born in Runan. Advised Liu Biao to ally with Cao Cao rather than Yuan Shao. Died in his 64th year at Wuling. Wang Jun was affiliated with Liu Biao.
